layers.title: Request provenance captured
layers.summary: The PR includes a conversation transcript that records the original high-level request for client-side URMA data-plane failover. It is provenance for the change and does not affect runtime behavior.

layers.title: Build targets added
layers.summary: The build layer makes the new tracker available to the existing client worker common API. Bazel and CMake both compile the tracker, while test build files add unit and system test targets.
layers.diff:
diff --git a/src/datasystem/client/BUILD.bazel b/src/datasystem/client/BUILD.bazel
@@ -73,6 +73,21 @@ ds_cc_library(
+ds_cc_library(
+    name = "urma_success_rate_tracker",
+    srcs = [
+        "urma_success_rate_tracker.cpp",
+    ],
+    hdrs = [
+        "urma_success_rate_tracker.h",
+    ],
+    visibility = ["//visibility:public"],
+    deps = [
+        "//src/datasystem/common/flags:ds_flags",
+    ],
+    alwayslink = True,
+)
@@ -87,6 +102,7 @@ ds_cc_library(
+        "//src/datasystem/client:urma_success_rate_tracker",
diff --git a/src/datasystem/client/CMakeLists.txt b/src/datasystem/client/CMakeLists.txt
@@ -4,6 +4,7 @@ list(APPEND CLIENT_SRCS
+        urma_success_rate_tracker.cpp

layers.title: Runtime flags introduced
layers.summary: The configuration layer adds two hot-updatable client flags: a success-rate threshold and a minimum sample count. Validators keep the ratio finite within [0.0, 1.0] and reject a zero sample floor, while the allowlist enables client config reload use.

layers.title: Tracker state machine
layers.summary: On top of the new flags, the tracker records request-driven URMA successes and failures into fixed windows. Window settlement uses atomic counters and a switch-in-progress gate, then applies failed-switch backoff and healthy-window reset behavior.

layers.title: Client failover wiring
layers.summary: The client worker API records Set/Publish URMA write results and Get-side fallback/error outcomes into the tracker. When an unhealthy settled window triggers, ObjectClientImpl submits an asynchronous switch with a new URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE reason that keeps the current worker available if no candidate switch succeeds.

layers.title: Client docs updated
layers.summary: The documentation layer exposes the two new client runtime parameters and their hot-update path. It also documents the zero-threshold disable behavior and the minimum sample count guardrail.
layers.diff:
diff --git a/docs/source_zh_cn/appendix/client_env_guide.md b/docs/source_zh_cn/appendix/client_env_guide.md
@@ -55,11 +55,21 @@
+## 客户端运行参数
+
+以下 gflag 参数可通过 `DATASYSTEM_CLIENT_CONFIG_PATH` 配置文件设置，支持热更新。
+
+| 序号 | 名称 | 默认值 | 取值范围 | 含义/用途 |
+|------|------|--------|----------|-----------|
+| 29 | `urma_failover_success_rate_ratio` | `0.5` | `[0.0, 1.0]` | Client 侧 URMA 数据面成功率阈值。一个完整统计窗口的成功率严格低于该 ratio 时，client 尝试切换 worker；设置为 `0.0` 表示关闭 URMA 故障切换功能，同时清空当前窗口状态。 |
+| 30 | `urma_failover_min_sample_count` | `5` | `> 0` | 每个 `client_dead_timeout_s` 统计窗口内进行故障切换判断前所需的最小 URMA 数据面样本数。样本不足时即使成功率很低也不会触发切换，避免少量请求误触发。 |
@@ -64,6 +74,7 @@
+4.客户端运行参数通过 `DATASYSTEM_CLIENT_CONFIG_PATH` 配置文件设置。

layers.title: Tracker and ST coverage
layers.summary: The final layer adds focused tracker unit tests for window settlement, threshold semantics, hot config reads, backoff, and concurrent boundary triggering. System tests exercise real KV traffic through local, remote, fallback, failure, hot-update, switch-failure, and switch-back scenarios.

summary: This PR adds client-side URMA data-plane health tracking and failover to another worker, with runtime flags, documentation, and UT/ST coverage.
